'''dhavuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sibness|sibness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sibness|sibness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhavuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhævikith|dhævikith]] || [[word:dhævikij|dhævikij]] || [[word:dhævikish|dhævikish]] || [[word:dhæviki|dhæviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavuvukuth|dhavuvukuth]] || [[word:dhavuvukuj|dhavuvukuj]] || [[word:dhavuvukush|dhavuvukush]] || [[word:dhavuvuku|dhavuvuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavukuth|dhavukuth]] || [[word:dhavukuj|dhavukuj]] || [[word:dhavukush|dhavukush]] || [[word:dhavuku|dhavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavufkufth|dhavufkufth]] || [[word:dhavufkufj|dhavufkufj]] || [[word:dhavufkufsh|dhavufkufsh]] || [[word:dhavufkuf|dhavufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhavukuthu|dhavukuthu]] || [[word:dhavukuju|dhavukuju]] || [[word:dhavukushu|dhavukushu]] || [[word:dhavukuku|dhavukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhavukuth|dhavukuth]] || [[word:dhavukuj|dhavukuj]] || [[word:dhavukush|dhavukush]] || [[word:dhavuku|dhavuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhavukuthul|dhavukuthul]] || [[word:dhavukujul|dhavukujul]] || [[word:dhavukushul|dhavukushul]] || [[word:dhavukukul|dhavukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhavukuuthuthu|dhavukuuthuthu]] || [[word:dhavukuujuju|dhavukuujuju]] || [[word:dhavukuushushu|dhavukuushushu]] || [[word:dhavukuuku|dhavukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhavukuthun|dhavukuthun]] || [[word:dhavukujun|dhavukujun]] || [[word:dhavukushun|dhavukushun]] || [[word:dhavukukun|dhavukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhavukuthuoro|dhavukuthuoro]] || [[word:dhavukujuoro|dhavukujuoro]] || [[word:dhavukushuoro|dhavukushuoro]] || [[word:dhavukukuoro|dhavukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
